title: Kanchan Tirana
overview: After Kanchan receives a beating from Sang Nila, he declares to take some martial arts lessons from an expert. When Kanchan feels that he is proficient enough to defend himself, he sets out to save the villagers from Sang Nila's tyranny.

trailers.title: Kapak Asli-Persembahan P.Ramlee Dari Filem Kanchan Tirana
